parsed.production_notes: The female character is clearly AI-generated, evidenced by her robotic arm, perfectly smooth skin, and slightly unnatural lip-sync. The male character appears to be human-recorded. The split-screen format is static throughout the main dialogue.

characters.appearance: Female, 20s-30s, slim build, fair complexion, dark hair. She has a distinct metallic, robotic right arm.
characters.wardrobe: Red and gold sari with a silver choker necklace.

characters.appearance: Male, 20s, average build, medium complexion, dark hair.

scenes.setting: Left: softly lit room with bokeh. Right: room with a bookshelf.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A, a young woman with a metallic, robotic right arm. She has dark hair and is wearing a red and gold sari with a silver choker necklace. She is positioned in a softly lit room with blurred, warm bokeh lights in the background. She is looking directly forward and gesturing slightly with her robotic hand.

A medium close-up of Character B, a young man with dark hair. He is wearing a dark blue, long-sleeved button-down shirt. He is standing in a room with a wooden bookshelf filled with books visible in the background. The lighting is warm and natural. He is looking forward and gesturing with both hands.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen showing Character A on the left and Character B on the right. They are having a conversation. There is a text overlay at the top of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: তোমার বাবা কোথায়? [Where is your dad?]
Character B says: My dad is out of station. [My dad is out of station.]
Character A says: Out of station না, out of town হয়। Out of station মানে station-এর বাইরে দাঁড়িয়ে আছে। [Not out of station, it's out of town. Out of station means standing outside the station.]
Character B says: ঠিক আছে, ঠিক আছে। আমার English-টা খুব weak. [Okay, okay. My English is very weak.]
Character A says: কোনো problem নেই। তুমি কখনো AI teacher try করেছো? [No problem. Have you ever tried an AI teacher?]
Character B says: ওইগুলো তো অনেক দামি হয় না? [Aren't those very expensive?]
Character A says: না, না normal English class-এর থেকে অনেক সস্তা। তাই এক কোটির বেশি লোক English শিখো app দিয়ে English practice করছে। [No, no, much cheaper than normal English classes. That's why over one crore people are practicing English with the English Seekho app.]
Character B says: আমি তো time-ই পাই না। [I don't even get time.]
Character A says: রোজ শুধু পনেরো কুড়ি মিনিট practice করলেই enough. আস্তে আস্তে দেখবি অনেক confident হয়ে যাবি। [Practicing just 15-20 minutes daily is enough. Slowly you will see you become very confident.]
Character B says: তাহলে আমি কিভাবে join করবো? [Then how do I join?]
Character A says: Install button-এ click করো আর English শিখো app install করো। শুধু এক রুপিয়ে trial দিয়ে start করো। দেখতে দেখতে কয়েক দিনের মধ্যেই improvement দেখতে পাবে। চলো আজ থেকেই শুরু করো। [Click the install button and install the English Seekho app. Start with just a one rupee trial. You will see improvement within a few days. Come on, start from today.]
scenes.on_screen_text: এই এআই শিক্ষক মাত্র ১ টাকায় ইংরেজি শেখানোর প্রতিশ্রুতি দিচ্ছে। (This AI teacher promises to teach English for just 1 rupee.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A graphic of a smartphone against a dark purple background with glowing, sparkling particle effects and a bright vertical light beam.

scenes.visual_description: An end-card showing the app logo on a smartphone screen with a call-to-action button and a clicking cursor.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: দেরি না করে install now-এ click করো আর English শিখো app download করে নাও। [Without delay, click on install now and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.visual_description: A black screen with white disclaimer text scrolling upwards.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
